rules.rule_text:
rule AgeLocker
{
	meta:
		copyright = "Intezer Labs"
		author = "Intezer Labs"
		reference = "https://www.intezer.com"

	strings:
		$a0 = "agelocker.go"
		$a1 = "filippo.io/age/age.go"
		$b0 = "main.encrypt"
		$b2 = "main.stringInSlice"
		$b3 = "main.create_message"
		$b4 = "main.fileExists"

	condition:
		any of ( $a* ) and any of ( $b* )
}
